title: Delicate Garlicky Argentinian Minari Skewers
description: A festive Argentinian dish featuring minari, with a garlicky and glassy-jelly texture, grilled to perfection over binchotan-charcoal, suitable for shojin-friendly diets
instructions: Preheat the binchotan-charcoal grill to medium-high heat
Trim the minari and cut it into 1-inch pieces
Mince the garlic and mix it with olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper
Thread the minari pieces onto the wooden skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Brush the garlic mixture onto the minari pieces
Grill the skewers for 3-4 minutes per side, or until the minari is tender and slightly charred
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional garlic and lemon juice if desired
Let the skewers rest for 2 minutes before serving
